message:
fix(util): add entropy and det_hash modules with clippy fixes

- Add OsEntropy and DetEntropy implementations for capability-based entropy
- Add DetHasher for deterministic hashing in lab runtime
- Fix clippy warnings: use Self instead of explicit type names
- Fix unusual byte groupings in SEED constant

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
